2026-02-27T12:33:52.9426331Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-02-27T12:33:52.9426898Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:52.9427324Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:52.9427697Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:52.9428009Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:52.9428242Z [36;1m[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:52.9428413Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:52.9428591Z [36;1m[0m

2026-02-27T12:33:52.9429009Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:52.9429213Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:52.9429605Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:52.9429978Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
